parameters.command:
=# SETUP CHECK
echo "Checking required tools..."
ffmpeg -version 2>/dev/null | head -1 || echo "MISSING: ffmpeg"
fc-list | grep -i 'open' | head -1 || echo "WARNING: OpenSans font may be missing"

# Create working directory
mkdir -p /tmp/videos_{{ $json.product_id }}
cd /tmp/videos_{{ $json.product_id }}

# Generate background slide for text overlay videos
# Navy gradient background 1080x1920 (vertical)
ffmpeg -y -f lavfi \
  -i "color=c=0x1B2A4A:size=1080x1920:rate=30" \
  -vf "drawbox=x=0:y=0:w=1080:h=8:color=0xC9A84C:t=fill" \
  -frames:v 1 /tmp/videos_{{ $json.product_id }}/bg_navy.jpg 2>&1

echo "SETUP_COMPLETE|/tmp/videos_{{ $json.product_id }}"

nodes.name: 💻 Setup Video Environment
nodes.notes: Creates working directory and generates brand background image. Requires: apt-get install ffmpeg fonts-open-sans

nodes.name: ⚙️ Build FFmpeg Commands
nodes.notes: Builds precise FFmpeg commands for each video type. Text overlays with fade-in/fade-out animations. Brand colors embedded. Outputs separate items for parallel processing.

parameters.command:
={{ $json.video_job.command }}

if [ -f '{{ $json.video_job.output_file }}' ]; then
  SIZE=$(ls -lh '{{ $json.video_job.output_file }}' | awk '{print $5}')
  echo "VIDEO_OK|{{ $json.video_job.output_file }}|$SIZE"
else
  echo "VIDEO_FAIL|{{ $json.video_job.output_file }}"
fi

nodes.name: 💻 Render Video (FFmpeg)
nodes.notes: Executes FFmpeg command for each video. Runs in parallel for all video types. Each video renders independently.

nodes.name: 🔀 Avatar Enabled?
nodes.notes: Only calls HeyGen API if avatar is enabled. Set has_avatar = false to skip and save API credits.

nodes.name: 🤖 HeyGen — Create Avatar Video
nodes.notes: SETUP: Sign up at heygen.com. Get API key from heygen.com/api-key. Choose an avatar ID from their library (select modest/professional appearance). Choose a voice ID. Free tier: 1 min/month. Paid: $29/month for 15 min.

nodes.name: ⏳ Wait 2 Min for HeyGen
nodes.notes: HeyGen typically takes 1-3 minutes to render avatar video. Adjust wait time as needed.

nodes.name: ☁️ Upload Videos to Drive
nodes.notes: Uploads all rendered MP4 files to Google Drive Videos folder.

meta.description: Workflow 09B: Video Renderer. Generates text-overlay videos via FFmpeg (TikTok 15s, Reels 30s, YouTube Shorts 45s, product zoom 8s). Optional HeyGen avatar UGC video. Uploads all to Google Drive. Logs to Video_Library sheet.
